resources.string: Spell checker uses entries from your contact list
Save copied text and images, open with a long press on the comma key
Suggest the last copied item in the suggestion strip for a short while
Delete all items from the clipboard history?
Nothing here yet. Copied text and images will show up here.
Indic Keyboard is free and open source - no ads, no analytics, no tracking; nothing you type ever leaves your device.
Picked up as you type and select suggestions
Words the keyboard learned from your typing will be deleted from this device. Dictionaries from language packs are not affected.
Learned by the transliteration engine as you type
Words Varnam learned from your typing will be deleted. Word packs downloaded with the language pack are kept.
Empties the recents row in the emoji palette
Show %1$s words in the suggestion bar when they match what you type on the English keyboard
Sync your personal dictionary across devices
Deletes your synced data from Google
Your synced data will be deleted from the cloud. Are you sure?

Your personal dictionary will be synced and backed up to Google servers. The statistical information of word frequency may be collected to help improve our products. The collection and usage of all the information will be compliant with Google\'s Privacy Policy.
Please add a Google account to this device to enable this feature
Sync is not available for devices with Google Apps for Business accounts
Language switch key covers other input methods too
Show when multiple input languages are enabled
Show a permanent emoji key on the keyboard. When off, long-press the ?123 key for emoji
Use names from Contacts for suggestions and corrections
Double tap on spacebar inserts a period followed by a space
Always show emoji key beside spacebar.
Capitalize the first word of each sentence
Do not suggest potentially offensive words
Spacebar and punctuation automatically correct mistyped words
Use the previous word in making suggestions
On transliteration layouts, show the Latin letters you typed as the first suggestion
Input a word by sliding through the letters
See the suggested word while gesturing
Input spaces during gestures by gliding to the space key
No voice input methods enabled. Check Languages & input settings.
Keep at least one layout enabled
Physical Alt key shows the emoji palette
Display application icon in the launcher

The selected language on your mobile device has an available dictionary.
We recommend downloading the %1$s dictionary to improve your typing experience.

The download could take a minute or two over 3G. Charges may apply if you don\'t have an unlimited data plan.
If you are not sure which data plan you have, we recommend finding a Wi-Fi connection to start the download automatically.

Tip: You can download and remove dictionaries by going to Languages & input in the Settings menu of your mobile device.
Downloading: suggestions for %1$s will be ready soon.
You don\'t have any words in the user dictionary. To add a word, tap the Add (+) button.
Perform a swipe from the delete key to select and remove bigger portions of text at once
Swipe on the spacebar to move the cursor
Gray out the suggestion strip when not learning from your typing
Varnam data for "%1$s" is not downloaded yet. Open Settings → Advanced → Varnam to download it.
Varnam engine is unavailable in this build.
Intelligent word-by-word transliteration. Download the language data to use it.
Remove the downloaded data for this language?
Could not download the language data. Please try again.
Type in 20+ Indian languages. Setup takes just a moment.
Turn on Indic Keyboard in your device\'s input method settings.
Set Indic Keyboard as your current keyboard.
Pick the languages you want to type in.
Pick the layouts you want for each language.
Downloading language packs so your layouts work right away.
Indic Keyboard is ready. Start typing in your language.

string-array.name: su_welcome_greetings
string-array.item: ကြိုဆိုပါတယ်
